claims.statement: Hyperion tree height is at least 2× larger than Victoria Falls height.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Hyperion tree height: 115.9 m. Victoria Falls height: 108 m.

claims.statement: Speed of sound in air (~20°C) is faster than Elite sprinter top speed (approx.).
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Speed of sound in air (~20°C): 1235 km/h. Elite sprinter top speed (approx.): 45 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is shorter than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are more grams in a kilogram than known chemical elements.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 1,000 g vs 118 elements.

claims.statement: First iPhone released happened before World Wide Web proposed.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First iPhone released: 2007. World Wide Web proposed: 1989.
